Rowan University · ACM CSPR · Computer Science Presentation Series
Your Research Journey Starts Here
DON'T JUST STUDY Present. Connect. Lead.

ACM CSPR is Rowan's premier student-run research series — where undergrads, grad students, and faculty come together every week to share ideas, publish work, and grow as researchers.

🎤
Step Into the Spotlight
Present once. Attend 8 more talks. Graduate the semester as a certified Research Ambassador — with an official certificate recognizing your research engagement.
EARN YOUR
CERTIFICATE
What You'll Get
🏅
Research Ambassador Certificate
Earn a recognized credential that proves your commitment to research culture — great for grad school apps & resumes.
🌐
Real Research Network
Build genuine connections with faculty, PhD students, and peers who are actively publishing and doing research.
🎙️
Stage Time & Visibility
Practice presenting your ideas in front of a live, supportive audience — a skill that sets you apart in any career.
💡
Hands-On Workshops
Master data analysis, machine learning tools, and research methods through practical, skill-building sessions.
📄
Paper Deep-Dives
Learn to read, critique, and discuss real papers from top CS venues — building your research intuition week by week.
🚀
Launch Your Research
Got an idea or project? Get feedback from faculty and peers who can help you shape it into something publishable.
Your Path to Ambassador
🎓
Research Ambassador Program
Complete both requirements in one semester to earn your certificate
1
Show Up
Come to your first CSPR talk — no prep needed
2
Present Once
Share your project, idea, or a paper you love
3
Attend 8 Talks
Grow by listening to peers & faculty research
🏆
Graduate as Ambassador
Receive your official certificate at semester end
Why It Matters
✓
Boost Your ResumeThe Ambassador certificate is a tangible credential employers and grad schools notice.
✓
Find a Research MentorWeekly talks connect you directly with faculty who are looking for motivated students.
✓
Build ConfidencePresenting in a safe, encouraging space makes every future talk — job, interview, defense — feel easier.
✓
Stay Ahead of the FieldExposure to cutting-edge CS research every week keeps you sharp and inspired.
📍
Room 302
Robinson Hall
🗓
Every Friday
3:00 – 4:00 PM
